name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine, shortening, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, water, corn syrup, and vanilla to the mixture. Beat well.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture. Mix until combined.
5. Stir in the oats and raisins.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
8. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the sheet before transferring them to cooling racks.
